/cwe/weakness/347.Name: Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature
/cwe/weakness/347.Description: The product does not verify, or incorrectly verifies, the cryptographic signature for data.

ModesOfIntroduction.Note: REALIZATION: This weakness is caused during implementation of an architectural security tactic.

CommonConsequences.Note: An attacker could gain access to sensitive data and possibly execute unauthorized code.

Entries.IntroText: In the following code, a JarFile object is created from a downloaded file.

Entries.BodyText: The JAR file that was potentially downloaded from an untrusted source is created without verifying the signature (if present). An alternate constructor that accepts a boolean verify parameter should be used instead.
